market.question: Can Claire analyze this market trend and demand signal?

route_selection.label: Market Intelligence Route
route_selection.primary_goal: Translate signals into market reality, timing, competitive pressure, demand logic, and portfolio implication.

route_profile.label: Market Intelligence Route
route_profile.primary_goal: Translate signals into market reality, timing, competitive pressure, demand logic, and portfolio implication.

evidence_answer.question: Can Claire analyze this market trend and demand signal?

classification.question: Can Claire analyze this market trend and demand signal?
classification.label: Market Intelligence

evidence_answer.direct_answer: Claire classified this as Market Intelligence and would answer using the trend_or_portfolio_path route with moderate_to_high evidence requirements.

evidence_basket.question: Can Claire analyze this market trend and demand signal?

classification.question: Can Claire analyze this market trend and demand signal?
classification.label: Market Intelligence

source.title: Claire Syntalion Unified Platform Definition v1
source.summary: Current compact platform definition consolidating Claire identity, specs, operations, functionality, governance, lifecycle, and roadmap.
supports: Claire is a governed lifecycle intelligence platform.
The 30-stage lifecycle is canonical.
Q&A should be intelligence-routed and evidence-aware.

source.title: Claire Master System Build Plan - Singularity-Aligned Edition
source.summary: Master governing document defining Claire as a recursive trend-discovery, portfolio-construction, breakthrough-escalation, system-transformation, and acquisition-readiness platform.
supports: Claire's root system is signal governance to trend discovery to thesis formation to portfolio creation or optimization.
Breakthrough escalation is conditional and governed.
Auto invention and design output are route-dependent.

source.title: Core Pipeline Architecture
source.summary: Defines inputs, signal governance, trend discovery, thesis formation, portfolio creation, breakthrough escalation, advancement routing, lifecycle memory, and recursive self-ingestion.
supports: Portfolio action is the normal early path.
Breakthrough escalation selects the correct downstream route.
Lifecycle memory enables stronger future runs.

source.title: Branching Master Pipeline
source.summary: Defines split paths for market/portfolio intelligence and breakthrough/design intelligence after thesis formation.
supports: Market and portfolio routes do not require full invention routing.
Breakthrough/design paths continue through buildability, viability, manufacturability, and feasibility.

source.title: Breakthrough Categories
source.summary: Defines broad breakthrough categories across technology, market, finance, operations, regulation, acquisition, system architecture, evidence, learning loops, and category creation.
supports: Breakthroughs are structural, not only technological.
Breakthrough classification can drive portfolio, strategy, acquisition, design, or system routes.

source.title: Claire AI Full Data Model Map
source.summary: Defines Breakthrough Object, Portfolio Candidate Object, Portfolio Item, signal objects, score objects, safety objects, cluster objects, and mode state.
supports: Claire intelligence should use structured objects rather than untyped text blobs.
BO, PCO, and PI are key internal primitives.

source.title: Claire AI Execution Flow Specification
source.summary: Defines mode initialization, ingestion, semantic processing, hybrid fusion, breakthrough detection, safety pre-validation, scoring, promotion, portfolio creation, and dashboard output.
supports: Safety and governance override every execution stage.
Connected and hybrid modes activate external ingestion only through governed pathways.

source.title: Claire AI Hybrid Mode
source.summary: Defines Claire's dual-core maximum capability state combining deterministic engine and connected intelligence engine.
supports: Hybrid mode fuses first-principles reasoning with live intelligence.
Hybrid mode supports cross-validated invention, market, deal, and portfolio intelligence.

source.title: Claire Connected Intelligence Mode
source.summary: Defines Claire's live market-aware intelligence mode with governed technology, market, competitor, regulatory, and acquisition signals.
supports: Connected mode uses governed external signal ingestion.
Connected mode supports real-time strategic intelligence and dynamic portfolio optimization.

source.title: Claire AI Subsystem Dependency Graph
source.summary: Defines dependencies among deterministic engine, connected engine, semantic layer, ingestion layer, hybrid fusion, scoring, portfolio engine, and safety governance.
supports: Connected engine cannot run without the safety layer.
Breakthrough detection is the central convergence point.

claims.text: Claire classified this as Market Intelligence and would answer using the trend_or_portfolio_path route with moderate_to_high evidence requirements.

assumptions: This response is a governed answer contract, not a live external research result.
No runtime mutation, live web action, or autonomous execution was performed.

route_sections.direct_market_read: Assess the question through trend strength, demand logic, competition, timing, and portfolio implication.
route_sections.trend_signal_read: Use signal governance and trend-discovery anchors before treating a market observation as actionable.
route_sections.demand_logic: Check whether the signal implies latent demand, rising demand, pricing power, or customer behavior change.
route_sections.competitive_pressure: Map visible competitors, category pressure, displacement risk, and timing windows.
route_sections.portfolio_implication: Translate the market read into exposure, weighting, watchlist, or action recommendation only after evidence passes threshold.
knowledge_sources: Claire Syntalion Unified Platform Definition v1

research.question: Can Claire review the research evidence and source quality?

route_selection.label: Research Intelligence Route
route_selection.primary_goal: Separate evidence, assumptions, inference, uncertainty, and verification requirements.

route_profile.label: Research Intelligence Route
route_profile.primary_goal: Separate evidence, assumptions, inference, uncertainty, and verification requirements.

evidence_answer.question: Can Claire review the research evidence and source quality?

classification.question: Can Claire review the research evidence and source quality?
classification.label: Research Intelligence

evidence_answer.direct_answer: Claire classified this as Research Intelligence and would answer using the research_answer route with high evidence requirements.

evidence_basket.question: Can Claire review the research evidence and source quality?

classification.question: Can Claire review the research evidence and source quality?
classification.label: Research Intelligence

source.title: Claire Syntalion Unified Platform Definition v1
source.summary: Current compact platform definition consolidating Claire identity, specs, operations, functionality, governance, lifecycle, and roadmap.
supports: Claire is a governed lifecycle intelligence platform.
The 30-stage lifecycle is canonical.
Q&A should be intelligence-routed and evidence-aware.

source.title: Claire AI Governance and Safety Documentation
source.summary: Defines Claire governance model, redline detection, compliance boundaries, oversight, intervention, mode-switching safety, and auditability.
supports: Governance overrides unsafe behavior.
Mode isolation and auditability are foundational.
Redline scenarios must block or require review.

source.title: Claire 30-Stage Lifecycle / Lifecycle Spine
source.summary: Defines the 30-stage lifecycle from Signal Ingestion through Final Package Construction.
supports: Every signal must be processable through the canonical stage contract spine.
Stages 16-22 are critical for route-aware design and buildability outputs.
Stage 30 constructs final packages.

source.title: Claire Enterprise Online Update Governance System
source.summary: Defines safe online update discovery, inspection, scoring, staging, validation, rollback, approval, and refusal rules.
supports: Claire may discover and stage updates online but may not modify active runtime code without validation and approval.
Update flow must be zero-trust, rollback-capable, audit-aware, and regression-resistant.

source.title: Recursive Learning Pipeline
source.summary: Defines completed run output storage, lifecycle memory, self-ingestion, pattern comparison, prior output comparison, and stronger future outputs.
supports: Completed runs become future inputs.
Recursive self-ingestion strengthens trend discovery, breakthrough detection, design, portfolio, and package construction.

source.title: Claire AI Full Data Model Map
source.summary: Defines Breakthrough Object, Portfolio Candidate Object, Portfolio Item, signal objects, score objects, safety objects, cluster objects, and mode state.
supports: Claire intelligence should use structured objects rather than untyped text blobs.
BO, PCO, and PI are key internal primitives.

source.title: Claire AI Execution Flow Specification
source.summary: Defines mode initialization, ingestion, semantic processing, hybrid fusion, breakthrough detection, safety pre-validation, scoring, promotion, portfolio creation, and dashboard output.
supports: Safety and governance override every execution stage.
Connected and hybrid modes activate external ingestion only through governed pathways.

source.title: Claire AI Mode Switching Architecture
source.summary: Defines explicit governed transitions between deterministic, connected, and hybrid modes.
supports: Claire never switches modes automatically.
Mode transitions require validation and governance checks.

source.title: Claire AI Subsystem Dependency Graph
source.summary: Defines dependencies among deterministic engine, connected engine, semantic layer, ingestion layer, hybrid fusion, scoring, portfolio engine, and safety governance.
supports: Connected engine cannot run without the safety layer.
Breakthrough detection is the central convergence point.

source.title: Technology Database and Search Dictionary
source.summary: Defines technology categories, maturity levels, dependencies, compatibility, cost, complexity, learning curve, performance, and recommendation structures.
supports: Claire engineering answers should consider maturity, compatibility, dependency, cost, and integration complexity.
Technology search is a structured intelligence layer, not generic text search.

claims.text: Claire classified this as Research Intelligence and would answer using the research_answer route with high evidence requirements.

assumptions: This response is a governed answer contract, not a live external research result.
No runtime mutation, live web action, or autonomous execution was performed.
